articles.title: 'We're sinking deeper': Iranians brace for infrastructure strikes as Trump deadline nears
articles.description: Ordinary Iranians respond to the US president's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges unless it opens the Strait of Hormuz.
articles.titleJa: 「我々はさらに沈む」：トランプ大統領の期限が迫り、イラン人はインフラ攻撃に備える
articles.summary: トランプ大統領がホルムズ海峡開放を要求し、応じなければイランの発電所や橋を破壊すると脅迫。一般のイラン国民は迫りくるインフラ攻撃への懸念を表明している。

articles.title: Ten killed in Israeli strikes and clashes between Hamas and militia in Gaza, local sources say
articles.description: The Israeli strikes reportedly targeted Hamas security personnel after they clashed with an Israeli-backed militia near Maghazi camp.
articles.titleJa: ガザでのイスラエル空爆とハマスと民兵の衝突で10人死亡、地元情報源

articles.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
articles.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.
articles.titleJa: イランの僻地での米空軍兵救出作戦はいかにして展開されたか
articles.summary: 敵対地域からの米空軍兵救出作戦は非常に複雑で、複数の米国政府機関が関与した。

articles.title: 'Really feeling the love' - Savannah Guthrie returns to NBC as search for mother goes on

articles.titleJa: 「本当に愛を感じる」—サバンナ・ガスリーがNBCに復帰、母親の捜索は続く
articles.summary: ナンシー・ガスリーがアリゾナ州ツーソンで誘拐されたとみられ行方不明。彼女の娘であるサバンナ・ガスリーはNBCに復帰し、周囲からの支援に感謝している。

articles.title: Kanye West's right to enter UK under review after festival outcry
articles.description: The rapper's appearance in London in July has caused controversy because of his past antisemitic comments.
articles.titleJa: カニエ・ウェストの英入国権が音楽祭での抗議を受け見直しへ

articles.title: Trump endorses ex-UK political aide Steve Hilton for California governor
articles.description: Steve Hilton, who advised the former prime minster and hosted a Fox News show, is running as a Republican.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、元英政治顧問スティーブ・ヒルトン氏のカリフォルニア州知事選出馬を支持

articles.title: Ladysmith Black Mambazo's 'wise elder' dies aged 77

articles.titleJa: レディスミス・ブラック・マンバゾの「賢明な長老」が77歳で死去
articles.summary: 南アフリカの著名な合唱グループ、レディスミス・ブラック・マンバゾで55年以上歌い続けたアルバート・マジブコ氏が77歳で死去した。

articles.title: US Supreme Court paves way for dismissal of Steve Bannon conviction
articles.description: The order allows a lower court to consider dismissing the former Trump strategist's indictment.
articles.titleJa: 米最高裁、スティーブ・バノンの有罪判決破棄への道を開く

articles.title: Seven Eritrean players fail to return home after international match
articles.description: Several footballers have absconded in the past leaving behind what rights groups call a repressive government.

articles.summary: 国際試合後、エリトリア代表のサッカー選手7名が帰国しなかった。過去にも選手が抑圧的な政府から逃れるため失踪している。

articles.title: Emergency jabs after 100 children die of suspected measles in a month in Bangladesh
articles.description: More than 100 people, mostly children, have been killed by measles since mid-March, officials suspect.
articles.titleJa: バングラデシュで1ヶ月に麻疹疑いで100人の子供が死亡、緊急接種を開始
articles.summary: バングラデシュで3月中旬以降、主に子供100人以上が麻疹で死亡した疑いがあり、当局は緊急予防接種を開始した。

articles.title: North Korea: Kim's daughter now seen as likely heir — South
articles.description: Seoul's spy service says the North Korean leader's "most beloved" daughter is increasingly seen as a likely successor. Officials say her appearances at military events are meant to normalize the idea of a female heir.
articles.titleJa: 北朝鮮：金正恩氏の娘が有力な後継者と見られる – 韓国
articles.summary: 韓国の情報機関によると、北朝鮮の金正恩氏の娘が後継者として有力視されており、女性後継者の考えを定着させるため軍事行事に参加させている。

articles.title: Myanmar junta chief elected president — what comes next?
articles.description: The head of the Myanmar's junta Min Aung Hlaing has swapped his uniform for the top civilian office, but the move is unlikely to bring peace or even create distance from the authoritarian system imposed by the 2021 coup.
articles.titleJa: ミャンマー軍事政権トップが大統領に選出 ― 次に何が起こるか？
articles.summary: ミャンマー軍事政権のトップが文民職に就いたが、この動きが平和をもたらしたり、2021年のクーデターで課された権威主義体制から離れたりする可能性は低い。

articles.title: North Korea welcomes Seoul regret over drones as 'wise'
articles.description: Pyongyang leader Kim Jong Un's sister says it was "very fortunate and wise" for South Korea's president to express regret for drone incursions into the North. Seoul had initially denied it was behind the survey flight.
articles.titleJa: 北朝鮮、ソウルのドローン後悔を「賢明」と歓迎
articles.summary: 北朝鮮は、韓国大統領が北朝鮮へのドローン侵入を後悔していると表明したことを「非常に幸運で賢明」と評価。ソウルは当初、偵察飛行への関与を否定していた。

articles.title: Bombing of Iran's pharma producers threatens patients' lives
articles.description: As the US and Israel continue their war with Iran, airstrikes on Iranian pharmaceutical and medical facilities are harming thousands of people by denying them medical treatment, doctors and activists warn.
articles.titleJa: イランの製薬会社爆撃、患者の命を脅かす
articles.summary: 米国とイスラエルがイランとの戦争を続ける中、イランの製薬・医療施設への空爆が数千人の治療を妨げ、患者の命を脅かしていると医師や活動家が警告している。

articles.title: Ukraine: 3 killed in Odesa, Kyiv targets Russian oil exports
articles.description: Russian drone strikes on the southern Ukrainian city of Odesa left at least three people dead overnight, including a 2-year-old girl. Meanwhile, Ukraine has continued retaliatory strikes against Russian oil facilities.
articles.titleJa: ウクライナ：オデーサで3人死亡、キーウはロシアの石油輸出を標的

articles.title: India news: PM Modi addresses election rallies in Assam
articles.description: An election race is in full swing in Assam as it goes to polls this week. Prime Minister Narendra Modi is attending three campaign rallies in the northeastern state on Monday.
articles.titleJa: インドニュース：モディ首相がアッサム州で選挙演説
articles.summary: アッサム州で選挙戦が本格化。モディ首相は今週投票が行われる同州で、月曜日に3つの選挙集会に参加する。

articles.title: Artemis II breaks record for farthest human spaceflight
articles.description: The Orion spacecraft is in its final phase, with NASA saying astronauts have broken Apollo 13's record for traveling the farthest distance from Earth.
articles.titleJa: アルテミスII、有人宇宙飛行の最遠記録を更新
articles.summary: オリオン宇宙船が最終段階に入り、NASAは宇宙飛行士がアポロ13号の地球から最も遠くへ旅した記録を更新したと発表。

articles.title: Mediterranean sharks are vanishing in a legal void
articles.description: Along Libya's coast, sharks — including breeding females — are being sold unchecked. With little enforcement and growing financial pressure on fishermen, vulnerable species are spiraling toward extinction.
articles.titleJa: 地中海のサメ、法の空白地帯で消滅の危機
articles.summary: リビア沿岸で、繁殖期のメスを含むサメが野放しで売買されている。取り締まりの甘さと漁師への経済的圧力により、脆弱な種は絶滅へと向かっている。

articles.title: Russians living in exile cope with grief far from home
articles.description: Since the start of the war against Ukraine, many Russians living in exile have been unable to return home for security reasons. Three of them told DW how they cope with the loss of loved ones far from their families.
articles.titleJa: 亡命ロシア人、故郷から遠く離れて悲しみに耐える
articles.summary: ウクライナ侵攻以来、多くの亡命ロシア人が安全上の理由で帰国できず、家族から離れて愛する人を失った悲しみにどう対処しているか語る。

articles.title: Iran war: Tehran reportedly rejects ceasefire proposal
articles.description: Iran has given ten conditions as it seeks a permanent end to the war, IRNA news agency reported. Meanwhile, Israel has targeted a key petrochemicals site. Follow DW for the latest.
articles.titleJa: イラン戦争：テヘランが停戦提案を拒否と報道
articles.summary: イランは戦争の恒久的終結を目指し10の条件を提示したと報じられた。一方、イスラエルは主要な石油化学施設を標的にした。

articles.title: People of Burkina Faso should forget about democracy, says military ruler
articles.description:
Ibrahim Traoré, who took power in 2022 coup, tells state broadcaster ‘we must tell the truth, democracy isn’t for us’
People in Burkina Faso should forget about democracy as it is “not for us”, the military president, Ibrahim Traoré, told the country’s state broadcaster.
Traoré took power in a coup in September 2022, toppling another junta that had taken power just nine months earlier. He has since stifled opposition and in January banned political parties outright.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ブルキナファソの人々は民主主義を忘れるべきだと軍事支配者が発言
articles.summary: ブルキナファソの軍事大統領イブラヒム・トラオレは、民主主義は自国には適さないと述べ、野党を弾圧し政党を禁止した。

articles.title: Uganda receives first US deportation flight under third-country agreement
articles.description:
Dozen people arrive under new deal but legal challenges expected with scheme criticised as ‘dehumanising process’
A flight carrying people being deported from the US has landed in Uganda, as Donald Trump’s administration pushes on with its strategy of expelling migrants to countries they have no ties to.
The deported people would stay in the east African country as “a transition phase for potential onward transmission to other countries”, an unnamed senior Ugandan government official told Reuters.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ウガンダ、第三国協定に基づき米国からの初の強制送還便を受け入れ
articles.summary: 米国からの強制送還便がウガンダに到着。この取り決めは「非人間的なプロセス」と批判されており、強制送還された人々はウガンダを「通過段階」として利用する。

articles.title: News outlets falsely report Somaliland called for extradition of Ilhan Omar
articles.description:
Reports, based on X post from unofficial account, follow JD Vance’s accusations and threats of finding ‘legal remedies’

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

Several news outlets have falsely reported that Somaliland’s government called for the extradition of Ilhan Omar, basing their stories on a post from an X account that does not represent the state despite its claims to the contrary.
Fox News, the New York Post, Sinclair Broadcast Group’s the National News Desk and the Independent ran stories on the US representative. The reports centred on a post by @RepOfSomaliland in reaction to claims by JD Vance that Omar had committed immigration fraud, which echoed prior allegations against the Somali-born Minnesota Democrat that she has vehemently denied.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ニュース各社、ソマリランドがイルハン・オマル氏の引き渡しを要求したとの誤報
articles.summary: ソマリランドがイルハン・オマル米下院議員の引き渡しを求めたという報道は、非公式Xアカウントに基づく誤報だった。米国内で政治的議論を呼んでいる。

articles.title: Interpol arrest warrant requested in Congo-Brazzaville for Jean-Guy Blaise Mayolas
articles.description:
Football federation president on the run with wife and son

Conviction in absentia of wide-ranging corruption charges

Authorities in Congo-Brazzaville have applied to Interpol for an international arrest warrant against Jean-Guy Blaise Mayolas, the president of the country’s football federation, Fecofoot, after he was convicted of embezzling $1.1m in Fifa funds.
Mayolas is on the run with his wife and son after they were all sentenced to life imprisonment this month for embezzling funds provided by world football’s governing body as part of its Covid-19 relief plan in February 2021. As the Guardian revealed last year, that included almost $500,000 earmarked for the Congo women’s team.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: コンゴ・ブラザヴィル、ジャン＝ギ・ブレーズ・マヨラスにインターポール逮捕状を請求
articles.summary: コンゴ・ブラザヴィル当局は、FIFA資金110万ドルを横領した罪で有罪判決を受けたサッカー連盟会長ジャン＝ギ・ブレーズ・マヨラスに対し、国際逮捕手配書を請求した。

articles.title: Weather tracker: Thunderstorms drench UAE and Saudi Arabia
articles.description:
Abnormally strong jet stream triggers deluge in Middle East, while north Africa braces for 60-80mph gusts
An unusual weather pattern unleashed severe thunderstorms across parts of the Middle East last week, battering countries including the United Arab Emirates and Saudi Arabia. The Arabian peninsula – typically dominated by arid desert climates – received up to 150mm of rain in just a few days.
The deluge was caused by an abnormally strong jet stream, which helped a deep area of low pressure to develop north of Saudi Arabia. This, in turn, drew moist tropical air from the Indian Ocean and triggered intense storms.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 気象追跡：アラブ首長国連邦とサウジアラビアを雷雨が襲う
articles.summary: 異常なジェット気流により、アラブ首長国連邦とサウジアラビアで激しい雷雨と最大150mmの豪雨が発生し、中東の乾燥地帯に大きな影響を与えた。

articles.title: House Democrats call for permanent solution to Cuban crises after witnessing energy blockade
articles.description:
Jonathan Jackson of Illinois calls Cuba ‘most sanctioned part of Earth’ amid US oil blockade causing vast disruptions

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

Two Democratic US lawmakers on Monday called for a permanent solution to crises confronting Cuba after they visited the island to witness the effects of an American energy blockade.

 The US House members Pramila Jayapal of Washington and Jonathan Jackson of Illinois met with the Cuban president, Miguel Díaz-Canel, and foreign minister, Bruno Rodríguez, as well as members of Cuba’s parliament during a five-day trip ending on Sunday.
“I denounced the criminal damage caused by the blockade, particularly the consequences of the energy siege decreed by the current US government and its threats of even more aggressive actions,” Díaz-Canel wrote on X.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 米下院民主党議員、エネルギー封鎖を目の当たりにしキューバ危機の恒久的解決を要求
articles.summary: 米下院民主党議員2名がキューバを訪問後、壊滅的な影響をもたらす米国のエネルギー封鎖を批判し、キューバの危機に対する恒久的な解決策を求めた。

articles.title: Mexican art world protests over plan to send Frida Kahlo masterpieces to Spain
articles.description:
Cultural figures sign open letter asking government for clarity on how long landmark collection will remain abroad
One of the world’s most important collections of 20th-century Mexican art, including works by Frida Kahlo and Diego Rivera, is set to be exported to Spain under an agreement with Banco Santander, sparking outrage among Mexico’s cultural community.
Nearly 400 cultural professionals have signed an open letter calling on the Mexican government to offer greater clarity on what the deal means for the masterpieces, particularly the works by Kahlo, which the Mexican state has declared an “artistic monument”.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: メキシコ芸術界、フリーダ・カーロ傑作のスペイン送付計画に抗議
articles.summary: メキシコの芸術界が、フリーダ・カーロらの傑作を含むメキシコ美術コレクションをスペインへ送る計画に抗議。文化財の海外流出とその期間について明確化を求めている。

articles.title: Cubans study oil tanker diplomacy for signs of progress in secret talks with US
articles.description:
Despite hostile rhetoric Trump let a Russian ship break his blockade – could it herald a Venezuela-style outcome?
When a sanctioned Russian oil tanker, the Anatoly Kolodkin, docked at Cuba’s Matanzas oil terminal on Tuesday, unloading 700,000 barrels of crude, it was not immediately clear why the ship had been allowed to pass through Donald Trump’s oil blockade.
In January, the US president had proclaimed on social media: “THERE WILL BE NO MORE OIL OR MONEY GOING TO CUBA – ZERO!” yet last week he told reporters, “If a country wants to send some oil into Cuba right now, I have no problem with it” – and waved the Russian ship through.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: キューバ人、米国との秘密交渉の進展の兆候を求めて石油タンカー外交を分析
articles.summary: 制裁下のロシア石油タンカーがキューバに寄港。トランプ大統領の姿勢の変化を受け、キューバではこれを米国との秘密交渉の進展の兆候と捉えている。

articles.title: One dead and dozens injured at Peru football stadium during pre-match event
articles.description:
Initial reports suggested parts of arena’s wall had collapsed, but Alianza Lima says there were no structural failures
One person has been killed and dozens more injured at the Alejandro Villanueva Stadium in Lima, Peru, according to the football club Alianza Lima.
Hundreds of fans were attending a “flag-waving event” on Friday around the stadium, a day before a derby match between the home team Alianza Lima and local rivals Universitario de Deportes.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ペルーのサッカー競技場で試合前イベント中に1人死亡、数十人負傷
articles.summary: ペルーのリマにあるアレハンドロ・ビジャヌエバ・スタジアムで、ダービー戦前のイベント中に1人が死亡、数十人が負傷した。クラブは構造上の問題はないとしている。

articles.title: Cuba begins to free more than 2,000 prisoners as US eases fuel blockade
articles.description:
Havana makes a Holy Week ‘humanitarian’ gesture as Russian tanker is allowed to reach oil-starved island

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

Cuban authorities have begun to free prisoners after announcing they would pardon 2,010 inmates, the second release in less than a month as the country faces heightened US pressure.
More than 20 inmates emerged from La Lima penitentiary in east Havana on Friday, holding their release papers, crying and hugging relatives who had been waiting for them all morning.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: キューバ、米国が燃料封鎖を緩和する中、2,000人以上の囚人を解放開始
articles.summary: 米国が燃料封鎖を緩和する中、キューバ当局は聖週間の「人道的」措置として、2,010人以上の受刑者の恩赦を開始した。既に20人以上が釈放されている。

articles.title: Trump warns Iran it could be destroyed 'in one night' as deadline nears
articles.description: Donald Trump has once again escalated threats against Iran, warning the country could be “taken out in one night” as the US deadline for Tehran approaches. Iran has rejected a proposed ceasefire, insisting on a permanent end to the war, while fighting continues to intensify across the region.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、イランに「一夜で破壊されうる」と警告 期限が迫る
articles.summary: トランプ大統領がイランに対し、「一夜で破壊されうる」と警告し、期限が迫る中、イランは停戦案を拒否。地域の戦闘激化が懸念される。

articles.title: Latest news bulletin | April 6th, 2026 – Evening
articles.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this April 6th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.
articles.titleJa: 最新ニュース速報 | 2026年4月6日 – 夕方
articles.summary: 2026年4月6日の夕方、ヨーロッパ各地と世界の重要なニュースをまとめた速報。ビジネス、エンターテイメント、政治など多岐にわたる話題をカバー。

articles.title: Are movies really getting longer – and if so, are ballooning runtimes a bad thing?
articles.description: A new study has crunched the numbers, and it turns out that while attention spans are dwindling, movie runtimes are growing.
articles.titleJa: 映画は本当に長くなっているのか、そして上映時間の肥大化は悪いことなのか？
articles.summary: 新しい調査によると、人々の集中力が低下する一方で、映画の上映時間は長くなっていることが判明。その影響について考察する。

articles.title: How can Ukraine help unlock the Strait of Hormuz?
articles.description: US President Donald Trump threatened to unleash "hell" on Iran if it failed to meet his Tuesday deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz to all shipping. Can Ukraine help unblock it?
articles.titleJa: ウクライナはいかにしてホルムズ海峡の封鎖解除を助けられるか？
articles.summary: トランプ米大統領はイランに対しホルムズ海峡の封鎖解除を要求し、「地獄」を解き放つと警告。ウクライナがこの問題にどう貢献できるかを探る。

articles.title: What could move the markets this week? Here’s what investors are watching
articles.description: European markets return from the Easter break on Tuesday, coinciding with a deadline set by US President Donald Trump for Iran to fully open the Strait of Hormuz.
articles.titleJa: 今週市場を動かすものは何か？投資家が注目するポイント
articles.summary: 欧州市場がイースター休暇から戻る中、トランプ米大統領がイランに設定したホルムズ海峡完全開放の期限と重なり、投資家は動向を注視。

articles.title: Serbia looks for pipeline sabotage plot culprit as Vance's Hungary visit nears
articles.description: Serbia has opened a probe into the attempted pipeline sabotage after explosives were found near Kanjiža, as military intelligence suspects a migrant with training, raising the temperature before a key election in Hungary on Sunday.
articles.titleJa: ハンガリー訪問が近づく中、セルビアはパイプライン妨害工作の犯人を捜索
articles.summary: ハンガリーの重要選挙を控え、セルビアはカンジジャ近郊で発見された爆発物によるパイプライン妨害未遂事件の捜査を開始。軍情報機関は訓練された移民を疑っている。

articles.title: Europe’s Entry/Exit System (EES): What travellers need to know before 10 April rollout
articles.description: The new EES system will be fully implemented from 10 April onwards and could help significantly modernise EU control systems – but not without a few initial hiccups along the way.
articles.titleJa: 欧州の出入国システム（EES）：4月10日導入前に旅行者が知っておくべきこと
articles.summary: 4月10日から完全に導入される新たなEU出入国システム（EES）について、旅行者が知るべき情報を提供。EUの国境管理システムを近代化するが、初期の課題も予想される。

articles.title: Iran rejects ceasefire proposal with US as war of words deepens
articles.description: Iran rejects a new 45-day ceasefire proposal, while the US is still expected to respond, as US President Donald Trump delays a threatened military strike tied to the Strait of Hormuz. Mediators are pushing for talks, but tensions remain high on both sides.

articles.title: In one of country's poorest states, Venezuelans hope for post-Maduro boom
articles.description: Ione Wells travels to Sucre, where a lack of investment has hampered locals' prospects.

articles.title: Cuba's mothers-to-be prepare to give birth in a country plunged into darkness

articles.title: Community micro-hydropower plants revolutionise isolated areas of the Dominican Republic

articles.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view

articles.title: Ecuador’s Netanyahu and Trump supporters target Ecuadorian–Iranian Cultural Center

articles.summary: エクアドルで、ネタニヤフとトランプの支持者がエクアドル・イラン文化センターを標的にした行動。信仰、民族、背景を理由とした敵視が問題視されている。

articles.title: Concerns grow as Jamaica ends Cuban medical programme

articles.title: How far-right ‘fear tactics’ affect girls seeking legal abortion in Brazil

articles.title: Healing a region: How healthcare is bringing peace to Arauca, Colombia

articles.title: The man who became one of India's greatest stage queens

articles.summary: 戦争が供給を圧迫しているため、プラスチックおよびガラス瓶の製造業者は原材料の入手が困難に直面している。

articles.title: Iconic 19th Century painting sets Indian art record with $17.9m sale
articles.description: Yashoda and Krishna, painted by Raja Ravi Varma, beat a record set by an MF Husain work last year.

articles.title: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits off Indonesia, killing one

articles.title: Alleged Bondi gunman loses court bid to suppress names of his family
articles.description: Lawyers for Naveed Akram had argued his mother, brother and sister live in "constant fear".
articles.titleJa: ボンダイ銃撃犯とされる人物が家族の名前非公開要求を裁判で却下される

articles.title: Members participating in IFD Agreement issue joint ministerial declaration at end of MC14
articles.description: The 129 WTO members participating in the Investment Facilitation for Development Agreement (IFDA) issued a joint ministerial declaration on 29 March at the end of the 14th Ministerial Conference in Yaoundé, Cameroon. A joint press release by the IFDA co-Coordinators — the Republic of Korea and Chile — is provided below.
articles.titleJa: IFD協定参加国、MC14終了時に共同閣僚宣言を発表

articles.title: MC14 concludes with adopted decisions, progress on key outstanding issues

articles.title: DG cites MPIA as "practical, confidence-building bridge" pending dispute reform deal
articles.description: The Multi-Party Interim Appeal Arbitration Arrangement (MPIA) is serving as a practical, confidence building bridge for WTO members committed to a fully functioning dispute settlement system pending an agreement on dispute settlement reform, Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala said on 28 March. She made her remarks at a meeting of parties to the MPIA on the sidelines of the WTO's 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14).
articles.titleJa: 事務局長、紛争改革合意までの「実用的で信頼構築の架け橋」としてMPIAを評価

articles.title: Ministers exchange views on key WTO topics, consider paths forward at MC14

articles.description: Sixty-six members, covering approximately 70% of global trade, have adopted a pathway to bring into force the WTO Agreement on Electronic Commerce through interim arrangements while continuing to work towards its incorporation into the WTO legal framework of rules, co-convenors announced on 28 March at the 14th Ministerial Conference taking place in Yaoundé, Cameroon. The joint press release is below.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国、暫定措置を通じて電子商取引協定を発効させる道筋を採択

articles.title: Adding value to cotton in Africa can drive inclusive growth, ministers and agency heads say
articles.description: Investment in the cotton, textiles and garments sector can help transform economic development in Central and West Africa, said speakers at a high-level event on the eve of the WTO's 14th Ministerial Conference in Yaoundé, Cameroon, on 25 March and at the opening ceremony on 26 March. Ministers, heads of international agencies, development finance institutions, private sector partners and FIFA representatives highlighted the opportunities for Africa to weave its way up the value chain to accelerate economic growth.
articles.titleJa: アフリカの綿花に付加価値をつけることが包摂的成長を促進すると閣僚や機関長が発言

This contribution builds on Australia's earlier contribution of AUD 2 million in May 2023.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリアがWTO漁業基金にさらに200万豪ドルを拠出
articles.summary: オーストラリア政府は、WTO漁業補助金協定の実施を支援するため、漁業基金に新たに200万豪ドル（約1.2百万CHF）を追加拠出しました。

articles.title: EU launches safeguard investigation on grain-oriented electrical steel
articles.description: On 27 March 2026, the European Union notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards that it had initiated, on the same day (27 March 2026), a safeguard investigation on imports of grain-oriented electrical steel.
articles.titleJa: EUが方向性電磁鋼板に対するセーフガード調査を開始
articles.summary: 欧州連合（EU）は、方向性電磁鋼板の輸入に対するセーフガード調査を開始したことをWTOに通知しました。

articles.title: Africa, Latin America strengthen economic and trade relations at MC14 side event
articles.description: A high-level meeting dedicated to reinforcing cooperation and trade relations between Africa and Latin America was held on the margins of the WTO's 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) on 27 March. In a keynote address, Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala highlighted the importance of this initiative to diversify trade and continue improving South-South trade.
articles.titleJa: アフリカとラテンアメリカがMC14サイドイベントで経済・貿易関係を強化
articles.summary: 第14回閣僚会議（MC14）の傍らで、アフリカとラテンアメリカ間の協力と貿易関係を強化するためのハイレベル会合が開催されました。

articles.title: Plastics Dialogue coordinators issue MC14 ministerial statement, technical outcome package
articles.description: On 26 March, the opening day of the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14), the six co-coordinators of the Dialogue on Plastics Pollution and Environmentally Sustainable Plastics Trade (DPP) — Australia, Barbados, China, Ecuador, Fiji and Morocco — presented a ministerial statement and a package of five technical documents. Together, they reflect the progress achieved by participating members since MC13 and set out a forward-looking roadmap for trade-related cooperation to address plastics pollution.
articles.titleJa: プラスチック対話の調整国がMC14閣僚声明と技術成果パッケージを発表
articles.summary: 第14回閣僚会議の開会日、プラスチック汚染と環境持続可能なプラスチック貿易に関する対話の調整国が閣僚声明と技術文書パッケージを発表しました。
